title: Prime Field And Composite Modulus Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite field composite nonfield QF_BV/DRAT regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Composite-modulus obstruction where a 3-bit residue inv < 6 is required to satisfy (2*inv) mod 6 = 1, but no residue works.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional finite-field rows only when they add distinct fixed-width inverse, distributivity, or table solver pressure; keep field extensions, algebraic closure, and quantified field theory in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode fixed prime-field operations as deterministic BV formulas or finite tables; the first composite-modulus no-inverse row now has a checked QF_BV/DRAT artifact.
Replay inverse-table witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation.
Continue emitting checked BV/CNF evidence for exhaustive no-counterexample and no-inverse rows.
Keep field extensions, algebraic closure, and quantification over all fields marked Lean-horizon.
